advancements.adventure.barrel_roll.title: 翻滾木桶！

advancements.adventure.build_house.title: 陋室，聚！

advancements.adventure.door.title: 尋庇

advancements.adventure.eye_frame_combina: 徙終眇眼，近終界結界門匡，以合之

advancements.adventure.iron_ingot.title: 猛鐵
